_comment: Curated SUPPLEMENT to the vendored Unicode data -- two roles, both deliberately small:
1. `name`   : offline fallback so the milestone characters resolve even before
fetch-data.js is run. When UnicodeData.txt is present, UCD wins.
2. `visual`/`ipa` : residual anchor hints for letter-identity look-alikes that
UTS #39 confusables omits (its scope is visual spoofing, not letter
identity) and whose Unicode name carries no base letter -- e.g. ENG,
EZH, SCHWA. `visual` outranks `ipa` in the cascade.
This file should stay TINY: anything UCD names or confusables.txt already cover does

0253.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER B WITH HOOK

0181.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER B WITH HOOK

0257.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D WITH HOOK

018A.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER D WITH HOOK

0256.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D WITH TAIL

0199.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER K WITH HOOK

0198.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER K WITH HOOK

01B4.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER Y WITH HOOK

01B3.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER Y WITH HOOK

028B.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER V WITH HOOK

01B2.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER V WITH HOOK

0272.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER N WITH LEFT HOOK

019D.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER N WITH LEFT HOOK

0268.name: LATIN SMALL LETTER I WITH STROKE

0197.name: LATIN CAPITAL LETTER I WITH STROKE
